Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a list of targeted open ended questions to ask an interviewee about a complex property onboarding process The goal is to clarify and improve understanding by uncovering missing details understanding decision criteria clarifying roles responsibilities verifying timing sequencing and learning about exception handling No SQL or implementation details

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to structure the questions logically perhaps grouping them by theme but the prompt just asks for a list I should make them open ended targeted and conceptual

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Gaps Areas to probe 1 Process boundaries and triggers What exactly starts the process Is there a formal contract signed before documentation review What ends it exactly 2 Documentation verification What constitutes outdated How long does verification take Who has authority to approve incomplete docs 3 Database entry Is there a standard form Who else reviews this data 4 Property manager assignment Is this automated or manual Who makes the final call What if no suitable manager is available 5 Introductory meeting Is this always a call What happens if expectations do not align 6 Photography Inspection Are these done in parallel or sequence Who pays for the photographer inspector What if the landlord refuses repairs 7 Marketing Pricing How dynamic is the pricing model Who has final approval on listing price 8 Activation What does activated mean exactly Are there staged rollouts 9 Tenant screening selection What are the specific criteria weights How are fair housing laws ensured during selection What if no tenants apply 10 Lease finalization Is there a standard lease template How are custom clauses handled legally 11 Quality checks audits Are these parallel or after lease signing Can they block the process 12 Exceptions Special insurance custom clauses furnished rentals and more How are these escalated 13 Timing and sequencing Are there SLAs What is the typical duration Which steps are bottlenecks 14 Communication Tracking How is handoff done between roles What happens if something falls through cracks in email CRM 15 Stakeholders External stakeholders like contractors photographers are they vetted contracted 16 Success metrics How do they know the process is working well 17 Variations by property type city Does the process differ for luxury versus student housing By jurisdiction

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I should organize these into categories for readability but ensure they are all open ended Categories Process Scope and Boundaries Documentation and Initial Review Roles Responsibilities and Decision Making Timing Sequencing and Dependencies Inspections Repairs and Marketing Tenant Screening and Lease Execution Exceptions Edge Cases and Escalations Communication Handoffs and Oversight
